label: UKMTO: Critical
description: IRGC seized two commercial vessels (MSC Francesca, Epaminondas) on 22 Apr 2026 — total incidents now 34 since crisis began. US naval blockade in force since 13 Apr; Trump ordered USN to engage any vessel laying mines in Hormuz. Commercial transits remain at single digits per day vs. 138 baseline. JMIC regional risk CRITICAL (Update 034, 19 Apr). Red Sea elevated as Houthis threaten to resume attacks following Iran conflict re-escalation.
